race.description: Girls Day Out 7 March Open Handicap
race.comment: NAILS MURPHY (6) won two in succession then came from a minute back but just failed to pick up NOBLE CONQUEROR over this course and distance two weeks ago. Drops a massive 6.5kgs today for the step up to open company. Beautifully placed to continue his rich form of late. DEMON DARB (9) was there to strike but was a shade disappointing here last time. Like the senior rider going on this time. Has won twice here at the mile from five runs and on 52kgs is worth an each-way ticket. NOBLE CONQUEROR (7) has won three of his last four, relegating in-form opponents at each of those wins. Particularly likes Eagle Farm - it would be brave to say he cannot get the job done again. GALIFIANAKIS (4) led but couldn't hold out NOBLE CONQUEROR and NAILS MURPHY when they clashed here a fortnight ago. Tricky gate but should press forward and give a sight with no weight. QUOTHQUAN (10) is cherry ripe after three runs back and comes here in preference to an easier Race 5.
